commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `openai-audio-transcriptions` to the OpenAI OAuth allowlist, exports `isAuthModeAllowedForModel` for tests, and adds unit coverage for audio transcription auth modes.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +34. Total +38 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows an explicit OpenAI OAuth audio profile reaches `resolveApiKeyForProvider` with `modelApi: "openai-audio-transcriptions"`; this PR would allow it through to the Platform transcription request instead of the current API-key/fallback path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the blocker is the OpenAI batch transcription auth contract and real OAuth behavior proof, not a safe mechanical repair.

target.title: fix(auth): allow OpenAI OAuth tokens for audio transcription API
target.body:
## Summary

Restores OAuth-backed OpenAI batch audio transcription that was broken by PR #90793. The fix adds `openai-audio-transcriptions` to the whitelist of OpenAI model APIs that accept OAuth tokens instead of requiring platform API keys.

## Root Cause

PR #90793 ("Fix OpenAI audio auth to use API keys") introduced a modelApi-level auth check that requires API keys for *all* OpenAI APIs except `openai-chatgpt-responses`. This inadvertently broke the OAuth audio transcription path for users who:
1. Configure `tools.media.audio.models` with `provider: "openai"`
2. Use an OpenAI/Codex OAuth profile instead of a platform API key

This functionality was explicitly added in PR #77595 ("route Codex audio to transcription model") and was working before the auth contract change.

## Solution

Add `openai-audio-transcriptions` to the whitelist of OpenAI model APIs that allow OAuth authentication, matching the existing pattern for ChatGPT responses.

## Tests

### Unit Tests

1. ✅ `openai-audio-transcriptions` modelApi allows OAuth mode
2. ✅ `openai-audio-transcriptions` modelApi still allows API-key mode (no regression)
3. ✅ Other OpenAI model APIs (e.g. `openai-completions`) still require API-key

Fixes #96135
target.author: katerhong
